reasoning: The limiter for you is the 25W drop from the 5-min to the 20-min power, which indicates poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Your last ride showed a focus on endurance rather than intensity. This workout targets the requirements of the Alpine Loop by improving your ability to sustain higher power over time.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 5 x 5-minute over-unders at 242W to 256W, with 5-minute recoveries at 209-223W. Focus on rhythm and breathing.

suggested_sets.name: Cooldown
suggested_sets.description: Easy spin to flush out lactate

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
